configurations.name: Flutter: Web hot reload (IDE debug)
configurations.//: NOT the same as the 'Web preview' task. The Dart extension owns the dwds connection and forwards it through the IDE itself, so this debug session can hot-reload where the RAW 'flutter run -d web-server' command (which the Web preview task deliberately avoids) goes blank behind the HTTPS gateway. Use this for hot reload + breakpoints; if the tab stays blank in your gateway setup, fall back to the reliable 'Web preview' task (profile build over HTTP, no hot reload).

configurations.name: Flutter: On-cluster Android device
configurations.//: preLaunchTask runs 'device-status' so adb is connected before the picker opens; then pick the on-cluster device.
